_doc: Labeled benchmark for the EXPERIMENTAL rabbi.identity.pin disambiguator. The 14 cases are every UNIQUE mention in Berakhot 2a-11b (tests/fixtures/berakhot-rabbi-casts.json) that the deterministic grounder returns 'ambiguous' for — i.e. exactly the cases the pin fires on. category: 'clear' = a textbook stam/identity with one right answer (scored for accuracy); 'hard' = scholarly-ambiguous without the daf text (report-only, not scored); 'decline' = the correct figure is NOT among the candidates, or genuinely undecidable, so the pin SHOULD return null/low. accept = acceptable slugs (arrays cover registry-duplicate nodes that are the SAME person). Run via: pnpm --filter talmud test:int (RUN_PIN_BENCH=1 + .dev.vars env).

cases.name: Rabbi Eliezer
cases.note: stam tannaitic Rabbi Eliezer = R' Eliezer b. Hyrcanus (the Great)

cases.name: Rabbi Yehoshua
cases.note: stam tannaitic Rabbi Yehoshua = R' Yehoshua b. Hananyah (registry has a dup node)

cases.name: Rabbi Shmuel bar Nachmani
cases.note: full name; ambiguous only because of a registry dup node (same person)

cases.name: Rabbi Yishmael b. Elisha
cases.note: full name; registry dup node (same person)

cases.name: Rabbi Elazar
cases.note: Bavli stam R' Elazar = b. Pedat (amora); but tagged tanna-4 and undecidable without the daf cast (R' Chanina/R' Yochanan)

cases.name: Shmuel
cases.note: the famous Amora Shmuel of Nehardea, not Shmuel the Little (a Tanna)

cases.name: Rabbi Shimon
cases.note: stam tannaitic Rabbi Shimon = R' Shimon bar Yochai (the motivating case)

cases.name: Rabbi Yehoshua
cases.note: stam tannaitic Rabbi Yehoshua = R' Yehoshua b. Hananyah

cases.name: Rav Yehuda
cases.note: stam Rav Yehuda = Rav Yehuda b. Yechezkel (Pumbedita) — but that node is NOT among the candidates, so the pin should decline rather than pick a minor Rav Yehuda

cases.name: Rabbi Eliezer
cases.note: stam tannaitic Rabbi Eliezer = R' Eliezer b. Hyrcanus

cases.name: Rabbi Ya'akov
cases.note: no textbook stam among the listed minor R' Yaakovs; genuinely undecidable without the daf text

cases.name: Rabbi Elazar
cases.note: Bavli stam R' Elazar = b. Pedat; undecidable without the daf cast
